detaileddescription.para: Generated from class MR::PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

Returns a pointer to a member variable of class MR::PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams named voxelSize. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.

Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_DestroyArray(). Use MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

memberdef.argsstring: (MR_Vector3f voxelSize, float offsetCount, MR_AffineXf3f worldXf, MR_AffineXf3f *outXf, MR_PassBy cb_pass_by, MR_std_function_bool_from_float *cb)
memberdef.name: MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_ConstructFrom

detaileddescription.para: Constructs MR::PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams elementwise. The reference to the parameter voxelSize might be preserved in the constructed object. The reference to the parameter worldXf might be preserved in the constructed object. The reference to the parameter outXf might be preserved in the constructed object. The reference to the parameter cb might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it had previously.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Must call MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_PolylineToDistanceVolumeParams. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_PolylineToVolumeParams_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
